return(function(S,X,e,u,c,j,P,p,x,w,J,U,I,q,A,G,a,D,Y,V,i,f)f,w,x,q,Y,V,I,i,p,A,G,D,U,J,a=function(f,e,u,c)local g,K,n,q,Q,W,v,B,P,I,R,m,h,l,t,k,Z,i,C,O,d,E,L,r,H,T,b,G,N,z,o,F,Y,s while f do if
